diagnosis.differential_diagnosis: Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD), Cor Pulmonale, Chronic Kidney Disease (CKD)
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient presented with significant weight gain, dyspnea on exertion, and signs of fluid overload, which were consistent with heart failure exacerbation. The decision for admission was made based on worsening symptoms, including hypoxia and edema. Improvement was noted with intravenous diuretics during hospitalization.
